caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey faux-hawk hairstyle is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and large black headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with framed photographs and apparel, including items labeled "LEE". Overlaid on the video is a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions shifting from a neutral look to a more animated expression with his mouth open. In the final frames, he begins to move his right arm and hand, gesturing as he speaks, while the camera angle remains static and the background elements stay consistent.
